---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for the Pastebin project
title: "[FEAT] <short description>"
labels: enhancement, needs-review
assignees: ''
---

## ✨ Feature Request

### Problem Statement
<!-- Describe the problem or gap this feature would solve. -->

### Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the feature you'd like to see, clearly and concisely. -->

### Alternatives Considered
<!-- Have you considered any alternative approaches or workarounds? -->

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

### Mockups / References
<!-- Attach wireframes, screenshots from similar tools, or reference links. -->

### Impact & Priority
| Field            | Value                                    |
|------------------|------------------------------------------|
| Affected Users   | e.g. All users / Admin only / API users  |
| Priority         | e.g. High / Medium / Low                 |
| Effort Estimate  | e.g. Small / Medium / Large              |

### Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this is not a duplicate
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project's goals and scope
- [ ] I am willing to contribute a PR for this feature
